Copia hasn't had the time or energy to relieve himself in a good while but when he finally does, you interrupt him. But maybe it doesn't have to turn out so bad, maybe you can help him.

I neeeed to start making bots more consistently oml.... My creativity and motivation has been so bad recently though 😭 (I blame it on the 2k word fanfic I wrote)
